clauses.text: License grants non-exclusive right to use software in licensee's primary territory.
Royalty rate: 8% of gross revenue derived from licensed product.
Sublicensing requires written consent of all parties.
All user data processed under applicable jurisdiction law.
Licensor may audit usage logs annually with 30-day notice.
Each party's liability capped at fees paid in prior 12 months.
Licensee ensures regulatory compliance in all deployment regions.
Derivative works owned jointly; commercialisation requires consent.
Either party may terminate for material breach with 60-day cure period.
Agreement governed by laws of Singapore.
